nasb.text: Yet she multiplied her harlotries, remembering the days of her youth, when she played the harlot in the land of Egypt.

esv.text: Yet she increased her whoring, remembering the days of her youth, when she played the whore in the land of Egypt

cnv.text: 她還加倍行淫，懷念她幼年在埃及地行淫的日子。

ccb.text: 她却更加淫乱，怀念自己年轻时在埃及为娼的日子，
